analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet highlights engagement with Afghan civil society and stresses the importance of EU support for women, civil society, victims, and human rights within an inclusive peace process. Evaluation: EU1 (EU is a successful story) – Not referenced; no historical success or lessons. EU2 (EU is united) – No mention of EU unity or intra-EU agreement. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – Not applicable; the focus is outside the EU. EU4 (EU avant-garde) – No pioneering policy claim. EU5 (EU as global champion of fair causes) – Yes; it emphasizes EU support for human rights, women, victims, and civil society, portraying the EU as defending fair causes abroad. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – Yes; by supporting an inclusive peace process in Afghanistan, the tweet frames the EU as contributing to peace and global well-being. Conclusion: EU5 and EU6 are promoted.
